data.content: Implementation complete and pushed. Commit 3a125bb1 (branch codex/foolery-a7a1-no-oneshot-take; also pushed to origin/main) forbids one-shot cli-arg transports for take/scene terminal dispatch. Added src/lib/terminal-dispatch-capabilities.ts to resolve take/scene capabilities through interactive transports and fail with FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE if cli-arg would be used. Updated initial and follow-up take paths to remove buildPromptModeArgs fallbacks. Fixed approval harness knot-id lookup so timestamp tokens are not parsed as knot ids, and documented that approval harness terminal calls remain take/scene interactive sessions. Verification passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/test-cli-approvals-manual.mjs --dry-helper-checks; git diff --check; bun run test; bun run build.
